title: gymnanthemum bellinghamii
intro: Gymnanthemum bellinghamii, also known as Bellingham daisy or Bellingham gorse, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with medicinal properties attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. Health benefits of Gymnanthemum bellinghamii include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the relief of urinary tract issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
